(2) «are canes a sah wares At atta & gaa att 2. serferra aire orapfes the fafRarrs (detfeers site tafe sears creer wy fear, Porter, savers at faeare aaa > Faro eafat ar orfepe wear) fates, 2012, % fafaa 22 4 aa-fattan (2) & few Prafrtas a1 earfie Peo STAT, ATL | oa fatten $ caveat ® wr F af, arg wea sera Bia 2 a Saar fg ars art Fe aT" , catvax wea, fer erates (a7) [fasrrrs-11/4/5741./188/14] ura fect : en fafa ara. 722(a), fers 1-9-2010 % arean @ afer ge a! -- 1 of 2 -- l6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY {PART Iil- SEC. 4] NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st January, 2015 F. No. L-MISC/V1/1/2007. --In exercise of the powers conferred by section 61 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations to amend the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Authorizing Entities to Lay. Build, Operate or Expand Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipelines) Regulations, 2010, namely :— 1. Short title and commencement. (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Authorizing Entities to Lay, Build, Operate or Expand Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipelincs) Amendment Regulations, 2014. ° (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2, In regulation 22 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Authorizing Entities to Lay, Build. Operate or Expand Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipelines) Regulations, 2010, for sub-regulation (2), the following shall be substituted, namely:- (2) If any question arises as to the interpretation of these regulations, the same shail be decided by the Board.”. Foot Note: Principal regulations were notified vide G.S.R. 722(E), dated 1-9-2010. -- 2 of 2 --
